item.title: Outstanding Prize in a Macao Regional Entrepreneurship Competition
item.description:
Last year, it was my great pleasure to know some young Macanese who were undergraduate students with talent, skill and motivation in University of Macau. We together did some research in wireless charging for electric vehicles, and several research papers got published in high-ranking IEEE journals. Later, we participated in 2020 Bank of China Trophy One Million Dollar Macao Regional Entrepreneurship Competition and won an outstanding prize. To be continued, our team will join the nationwide final competition to win 1 million RMB. See you in the final.

Sincere appreciation to Paul, Charles, Sou and Victor! Cheers!🍻

Thanks for the support by Prof. Chi-Seng Lam, Prof. Pui-In Mak and Prof. Rui P. Martins from State Key Laboratory of Analog and Mixed-Signal VLSI, University of Macau!
